<?xml version='1.0' encoding='utf-8'?>
<e:Skin class="YPSkins.YoPlayPopupBoardConfirmButtonSkin"  currentState="up" xmlns:Locale="Locale.*"  states="up,down,disabled" height="40" xmlns:e="http://ns.egret.com/eui" xmlns:w="http://ns.egret.com/wing" minWidth="130">

	<Locale:LocaleLabel id="labelDisplay" size="24" localeKey="{localeKey}"  verticalAlign="middle" textAlign="center" text="Confirm" textColor="0xFFFFFF" left="20" alpha.disabled="0.5" right="20" bold="true" top="0" bottom="0"/>
</e:Skin>

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='utf-8'?>
<e:Skin class="YPSkins.YoPlayTextInputSkin" minHeight="40" minWidth="300" states="normal,disabled,normalWithPrompt,disabledWithPrompt" xmlns:e="http://ns.egret.com/eui">
	<e:Image width="100%" height="100%" scale9Grid="1,3,8,8" source="button_up_png" visible="false"/>
	<e:Rect height="100%" width="100%" strokeWeight="2" fillAlpha="1" ellipseWidth="16" fillColor="0x000000" strokeColor="0xffffff"/>
 	<e:EditableText id="textDisplay" verticalAlign="{verticalAlign}" left="10" right="10"
	                textColor="0xffffff" textColor.disabled="0xff0000" width="100%" size="20"  top="8" bottom="8" textAlign="left" text="{text}"/>
	<e:Label id="promptDisplay" left="10" right="10"
	                textColor="0xa9a9a9" width="100%" size="20" touchEnabled="false" includeIn="normalWithPrompt,disabledWithPrompt" top="0" bottom="0" textAlign="left" verticalAlign="middle"/>
</e:Skin>

<e:Skin class="YPSkins.AutoBetInfoPopupSkin" xmlns:e="http://ns.egret.com/eui" xmlns:Locale="Locale.*" xmlns:YPUi="YPUi.*" xmlns:Common="Common.*" states="default,start,startFail,stop,stopPayout,endPayout" >
    <e:Image id="popupBg" left="0" right="0" top="0" bottom="0" anchorOffsetY="0" scale9Grid="80,80,20,20" source="vip_msc_border_theme1" x="0" y="0" scaleX="1" scaleY="1"/>
    <e:Image id="popupBgOnTop" left="0" right="0" anchorOffsetY="0" height="65" source="vip_msc_border_top_theme1" scale9Grid="57,43,16,33" top="0"/>
	<e:Image id="topVipIcon" source="vip_msc_vipinfo_icon_label" top="-5" left="70"  visible="false"/>

    <Locale:LocaleLabel includeIn="start,startFail" horizontalCenter="0" y="37" size="20" fontFamily="Arial" text="自动下注" localeKey="yoplayplaza.autobet.start.title" bold="true"/>
    <Locale:LocaleLabel includeIn="stop,stopPayout,endPayout" horizontalCenter="0" y="37" size="20" fontFamily="Arial" text="自动下注结束" localeKey="yoplayplaza.autobet.payout.end_title" bold="true" text.stop="停止自动下注" localeKey.stop="yoplayplaza.autobet.payout.stop_title" />
    <e:Group includeIn="start,startFail" top="75" bottom="40" left="35" right="35">

        <e:Group width="400" bottom="70">
            <!--<e:Group width="300">
                <e:Rect fillColor="0xf6c04c" left="0" right="0" top="0" bottom="0" ellipseWidth="30"/>
                <Locale:LocaleLabel text="自动下注需要进后一次性扣全款" localeKey="yoplayplaza.autobet.start.payment_warn" textColor="0x000000" size="16" bold="true" top="8" bottom="8" right="10" left="10" textAlign="center" wordWrap="true"/>
            </e:Group>-->
            <!--<Locale:LocaleLabel text="余额不足，请充值或选择较少局数" localeKey="yoplayplaza.autobet.start.not_enough_wallet" includeIn="startFail" horizontalCenter="0" size="16" verticalCenter="0" textAlign="center" lineSpacing="5" wordWrap="true"/>-->
            <!--<Locale:LocaleLabel text="每局倒计时开始注單生效" localeKey="yoplayplaza.autobet.start.start_tips" includeIn="start" horizontalCenter="0" size="16" verticalCenter="0" textAlign="center" lineSpacing="5" wordWrap="true"/>-->
            <e:Group>
                <e:Group>
                    <Locale:LocaleLabel text="Bet No." localeKey="yoplayplaza.autobet.start.total_round" size="16" verticalCenter="0" right="215"/>
                    <e:Group width="200" height="25" right="0">
                        <e:Rect fillColor="0x000000" left="0" right="0" top="0" bottom="0" ellipseWidth="30"/>
                        <e:Label id="autoBetRound" text="-" horizontalCenter="0" size="16" verticalCenter="0" bold="true" textColor="0x00ff00"/>
                    </e:Group>
                </e:Group>
                <e:Group>
                    <Locale:LocaleLabel text="Total Bets" localeKey="yoplayplaza.autobet.start.total_amount" size="16" verticalCenter="0" right="215"/>
                    <e:Group width="200" height="25" right="0">
                        <e:Rect fillColor="0x000000" left="0" right="0" top="0" bottom="0" ellipseWidth="30"/>
                        <e:Label id="autoBetTotalAmt" text="-" horizontalCenter="0" size="16" verticalCenter="0" bold="true" textColor="0xff0000" textColor.start="0xd0d14a"/>
                    </e:Group>
                </e:Group>
                <e:layout>
                    <e:VerticalLayout horizontalAlign="right" paddingTop="5" paddingBottom="5"/>
                </e:layout>
            </e:Group>
            <Locale:LocaleLabel text="如中途按停，当局结束后会停止并退余额\r如遇服务问题，会即时停止并于恢复时退金额" localeKey="yoplayplaza.autobet.start.tips" horizontalCenter="0" size="14" verticalCenter="0" textAlign="center" lineSpacing="5" width="360" wordWrap="true"/>
            <e:layout>
                <e:VerticalLayout horizontalAlign="center" gap="15"/>
            </e:layout>
        </e:Group>

    </e:Group>
    <e:Group includeIn="stop,stopPayout,endPayout" top="75" bottom="40" left="35" right="35">
        <e:Group width="400" bottom="50">
            <e:Group includeIn="stop">
                <Locale:LocaleLabel text="成功停止自动下注\r将会在本局派彩后\r将剩余局数下注金额退回到额度之中" localeKey="yoplayplaza.autobet.payout.stop_success" horizontalCenter="0" size="16" verticalCenter="0" bold="true" textAlign="center" lineSpacing="5" wordWrap="true"/>
                <e:layout>
                    <e:VerticalLayout horizontalAlign="center"/>
                </e:layout>
            </e:Group>
            <e:Group includeIn="stopPayout">
                <!--<Locale:LocaleLabel text="自动下注停止，退回自动下注余额\r包含首场下注及手动加注派彩总额" localeKey="yoplayplaza.autobet.payout.stop_payout" horizontalCenter="0" size="16" verticalCenter="0" bold="true" textAlign="center" lineSpacing="5" wordWrap="true"/>-->
                <e:layout>
                    <e:VerticalLayout horizontalAlign="center"/>
                </e:layout>
            </e:Group>
            <e:Group includeIn="endPayout">
                <!--<Locale:LocaleLabel text="自动下注完结\r包含首场下注及手动加注派彩总额" localeKey="yoplayplaza.autobet.payout.end_payout" horizontalCenter="0" size="16" verticalCenter="0" bold="true" textAlign="center" lineSpacing="5" wordWrap="true"/>-->
                <e:layout>
                    <e:VerticalLayout horizontalAlign="center"/>
                </e:layout>
            </e:Group>
            <e:Group includeIn="stopPayout,endPayout">
                <e:Group>
                    <Locale:LocaleLabel text="派彩总额" localeKey="yoplayplaza.autobet.payout.payout_amount" size="16" verticalCenter="0" right="215"/>
                    <e:Group width="200" height="25" right="0">
                        <e:Rect fillColor="0x000000" left="0" right="0" top="0" bottom="0" ellipseWidth="30"/>
                        <e:Label id="autoBetPayout" text="-" horizontalCenter="0" size="16" verticalCenter="0" bold="true" textColor="0x00ffff"/>
                    </e:Group>
                </e:Group>
                <e:Group includeIn="stopPayout">
                    <Locale:LocaleLabel text="退回总额" localeKey="yoplayplaza.autobet.payout.return_amount" size="16" verticalCenter="0" right="215"/>
                    <e:Group width="200" height="25" right="0">
